question: What is the current Fed funds rate?
draftAnswer: ## Result Summary Internal Corpus Answer: unavailable in current local corpus. External Context: available. - [Federal Reserve Board - H.15 - Selected Interest Rates (Daily)](https://www.federalreserve.gov/releases/h15) | Federal funds (effective) rate: 3.67–3.69% (recent daily rates) - [FRED - St. Louis Fed](https://fred.stlouisfed.org/series/FEDFUNDS) | Federal Funds Effective Rate: 3.63% (May 2026, monthly) - [Trading Economics](https://tradingeconomics.com/united-states/interest-rate) | Fed Funds Interest Rate: 3.75% - [Federal Reserve Discount Window](https://www.frbdiscountwindow.org) | Fed Funds Target Range: 3.50–3.75%
